methodology_notes: Survey of 1,600 CISOs at organizations of 100+ employees across 16 countries (US, Canada, UK, France, Germany, Italy, Spain, Sweden, Netherlands, UAE, KSA, Australia, Japan, Singapore, South Korea, Brazil), ~100 per country. Aggregate global figures cited. Used here both as a distributional reference and as a source of paired on-task calibration questions (see calibration-map SEED_POINTS).

distributions.context: 64% of CISOs say enabling employee use of generative-AI tools is a strategic priority over the next two years
76% of CISOs feel at risk of a material cyberattack in the next 12 months
66% of CISOs would consider paying a ransom to restore systems or prevent a data leak
~60% of CISOs regard generative AI as a security risk to their organization
74% of CISOs view human error as their organization's most significant cyber vulnerability
